corelib.description: Beskid standard library aggregate: prelude and re-exports of foundation, runtime, console, concurrency, and compiler SDK packages.

foundation.description: Low-level primitives shared by Beskid corelib workspace packages (collections, results, strings, testing helpers).

runtime.description: Runtime and syscall surfaces for Beskid (System, process, and I/O helpers).

compiler_sdk.description: Typed compiler Mod SDK facades (Beskid.Compiler.*, Beskid.Syntax) for type: Mod projects.

console.description: Terminal and ANSI helpers (Console, Ansi) built on corelib runtime I/O.

concurrency.description: Cooperative concurrency primitives (Fiber, channels) and System.Threading OS-thread helpers.
